<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/qatTemp/datasource/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of data source from temp tables

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the pipeline to retrieve the data source list from","in":"path","name":"pipelineId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
